title: Imovinc
description: A general vanilla+ expansion to Minecraft.
body:
# IMOVINC: The Minecraft Expansion
**Imovinc is currently supported only by [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/). Currently there are no plans to port on [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/). [NeoForged](https://neoforged.net/) port is now worked on.**
## FEATURES
- Copper Tool and Armor Set
- Sulfur
- Explosive Arrows
- Fertilizer
